actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO parts_audit_log (
  part_id,
  action,
  movement_type,
  from_asset_id,
  to_asset_id,
  from_location_id,
  to_location_id,
  performed_by,
  condition_at_movement,
  notes,
  technician_signature,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  {{Number(appsmith.store.pal_part_id)}},
  '{{appsmith.store.pal_action}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.pal_movement_type}}',
  {{appsmith.store.pal_from_asset_id || 'NULL'}},
  {{appsmith.store.pal_to_asset_id || 'NULL'}},
  {{appsmith.store.pal_from_location_id || 'NULL'}},
  {{appsmith.store.pal_to_location_id || 'NULL'}},
  '{{appsmith.user.name}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.hp_condition_grade}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.hp_notes}}',
  '{{appsmith.store.hp_signature}}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;
